text: You're allowed to have an off day. But don't let it turn into an off week. Consistency is what separates progress from excuses. I'm on week 2 of getting back to the gym and it's still a struggle, but I'm showing up.
decision_reason: Directly addresses the audience's pain point of feeling stuck and provides a motivational nudge to get back on track.

text: What's the smallest habit you can build today that'll move you closer to your goal? For me, it's doing 10 push-ups every morning. It's not much, but it's a start.
decision_reason: Asks the audience a question that encourages them to think about building small habits and provides a relatable example.

text: 3 things that happen when you don't prioritize your goals: you feel stuck, you lose motivation, and you regret the opportunities you missed. Don't let life pass you by. Take control and start making progress, no matter how small.
decision_reason: Highlights the consequences of not prioritizing goals and encourages the audience to take control of their life and start making progress.
